transits Libra, the native will get much wealth as the second house
from Libra is the place where Venus was at the time of birth. He will
possess his own house, vehicle and other property and earn a good repu
tation.
The second house from the Sun is occupied by Mercury and Ketu
which indicates· that the native's father took to the teaching profession.
As Venus is in the seventh house from Saturn the native's wife will also
be employed and earn money. Therefore, the family's wealth will improve
a lot.
